tool.name: crYOLO Train
tool.description: Train a crYOLO model on particle coordinate annotations
tool.command:
#import re mkdir -p train_imgs train_annots && #for $img in $train_images: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) ln -s '$img' 'train_imgs/$clean_name' && #end for #for $annot in $train_annots: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($annot.element_identifier)) ln -s '$annot' 'train_annots/$clean_name' && #end for
#set $has_validation = False #if $validation.valid_images and $validation.valid_annots: #set $has_validation = True mkdir -p valid_imgs valid_annots && #for $img in $validation.valid_images: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($img.element_identifier)) ln -s '$img' 'valid_imgs/$clean_name' && #end for #for $annot in $validation.valid_annots: #set $clean_name = re.sub('[^\w\-\.]', '_', str($annot.element_identifier)) ln -s '$annot' 'valid_annots/$clean_name' && #end for #end if
python -c " import json with open('$conf') as f: c = json.load(f) c['train']['train_image_folder'] = 'train_imgs' c['train']['train_annot_folder'] = 'train_annots' c['train']['saved_weights_name'] = 'final_weights.h5' #if $has_validation: c['valid'] = { 'valid_image_folder': 'valid_imgs', 'valid_annot_folder': 'valid_annots', 'valid_times': 1 } #else: c['valid'] = { 'valid_image_folder': '', 'valid_annot_folder': '', 'valid_times': 1 } #end if #if $pretrained_weights: c['train']['pretrained_weights'] = '$pretrained_weights' #end if with open('adjusted_config.json', 'w') as f: json.dump(c, f, indent=4) " &&
cryolo_train.py --conf 'adjusted_config.json' --warmup $warmup --early $early #if str($gpu_opts.gpu) != "": --gpu '$gpu_opts.gpu' --gpu_fraction $gpu_opts.gpu_fraction #else: --gpu -1 #end if #if $num_cpu != -1: --num_cpu $num_cpu #end if #if $fine_tune_opts.fine_tune: --fine_tune --layers_fine_tune $fine_tune_opts.layers_fine_tune #end if --seed $seed $cleanup $ignore_directions $warm_restarts $skip_augmentation && cp 'final_weights.h5' '$output_model'

param.name: conf
param.label: crYOLO Configuration File
param.help: Base configuration file generated by crYOLO Config.

param.name: train_images
param.label: Training Micrographs
param.help: Dataset collection containing raw micrographs for training.

param.name: train_annots
param.label: Training Annotations
param.help: Dataset collection containing coordinate annotations (corresponding 1-to-1 by file name to micrographs).

param.name: pretrained_weights
param.label: Pretrained Weights (.h5)
param.help: Optional initial weights for fine-tuning or starting from an existing model.

param.name: warmup
param.label: Warmup Epochs
param.help: Number of warmup epochs. Set to 0 if fine-tuning.

param.name: early
param.label: Early Stop Patience
param.help: Number of epochs to wait for validation loss improvement before stopping.

param.name: num_cpu
param.label: Number of CPUs to use
param.help: Set to -1 to use half of available CPU cores.

param.name: fine_tune
param.label: Enable Fine-Tuning
param.help: If checked, freezes backbone layers and trains only final layers.

section.name: validation
section.title: Validation Dataset Options
section.help: If omitted, crYOLO splits 20% of training data for validation.

param.name: cleanup
param.label: Clean up filtered files after training

param.name: ignore_directions
param.label: Ignore Filament Directions
param.help: Skip orientation angle training for filament datasets.

param.name: warm_restarts
param.label: Enable Cosine Annealing with Warm Restarts

tool.help:
**What it does**
This tool trains a crYOLO convolutional neural network model using a set of annotated micrographs. Training learns the representation of the target particles. It outputs a weights file (.h5) which can be used to run prediction/picking on new datasets.
